properties.name: camel.dataformat.pgp.algorithm
properties.description: Symmetric key encryption algorithm; possible values are defined in org.bouncycastle.bcpg.SymmetricKeyAlgorithmTags. Only relevant for encrypting.

properties.name: camel.dataformat.pgp.armored
properties.description: This option will cause PGP to base64 encode the encrypted text, making it available for copy/paste, etc.

properties.name: camel.dataformat.pgp.compression-algorithm
properties.description: Compression algorithm; possible values are defined in org.bouncycastle.bcpg.CompressionAlgorithmTags. Only relevant for encrypting.

properties.name: camel.dataformat.pgp.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable auto configuration of the pgp data format. This is enabled by default.

properties.name: camel.dataformat.pgp.hash-algorithm
properties.description: Signature hash algorithm; possible values are defined in org.bouncycastle.bcpg.HashAlgorithmTags. Only relevant for signing.

properties.name: camel.dataformat.pgp.integrity
properties.description: Adds an integrity check/sign into the encryption file.

properties.name: camel.dataformat.pgp.key-file-name
properties.description: Filename of the keyring; must be accessible as a classpath resource (but you can specify a location in the file system by using the file: prefix).

properties.name: camel.dataformat.pgp.key-userid
properties.description: The user ID of the key in the PGP keyring used during encryption. Can also be only a part of a user ID.

properties.name: camel.dataformat.pgp.password
properties.description: Password used when opening the private key (not used for encryption).

properties.name: camel.dataformat.pgp.provider
properties.description: Java Cryptography Extension (JCE) provider, default is Bouncy Castle (BC). Alternatively you can use, for example, the IAIK JCE provider.

properties.name: camel.dataformat.pgp.signature-key-file-name
properties.description: Filename of the keyring to use for signing (during encryption) or for signature verification (during decryption); must be accessible as a classpath resource (but you can specify a location in the file system by using the file: prefix).

properties.name: camel.dataformat.pgp.signature-key-ring
properties.description: Keyring used for signing/verifying as byte array. You cannot set the signatureKeyFileName and signatureKeyRing at the same time.

properties.name: camel.dataformat.pgp.signature-key-userid
properties.description: User ID of the key in the PGP keyring used for signing (during encryption) or signature verification (during decryption).

properties.name: camel.dataformat.pgp.signature-password
properties.description: Password used when opening the private key used for signing (during encryption).

properties.name: camel.dataformat.pgp.signature-verification-option
properties.description: Controls the behavior for verifying the signature during unmarshaling. Possible values: optional, required, ignore, no_signature_allowed.
